hook.name: Aegis Engine
hook.description: AegisHook is a Uniswap v4 hook that applies dynamic LP fees computed by an external DynamicFeeManager (overriding the pool fee each swap), charges a configurable hook fee on each swap via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta, and periodically reinvests accumulated hook fees into a full-range LP position through an AegisEngine contract.
